request: Part A test-suite speedup (behavior-preserving): (1) hoist redundant per-test cloneAndBuild/runBuild in build/manifest tests to shared before() blocks (skill-ownership.test.mjs AC-004 6x, manifest.test.mjs 2x); (2) env-gate the ~6 JVM-spawning PlantUML tests behind PLANTUML_TESTS=1 (off by default). Full node --test suite must stay green; integrate must run. No production code change.
